title: lippia nodiflora f. canescens
intro: Lippia nodiflora f. canescens, also known as the bushveld tea bush or wild bush tea, is a shrub that belongs to the verbena family and is native to southern Africa. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lippia nodiflora f. canescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate colds and flu, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, teas, or extracts, which can be consumed as a remedy for various health concerns.
